falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would contradict the bearish implications of the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume on the asset drops below the 50-day average by 30% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp decline in volume would indicate lack of market participation, directly refuting the blowoff score's implication of heightened volatility and momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index closes above 35 for three consecutive days within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volatility would invalidate the current pattern's similarity to the controlled recovery of bottom_2022_may_luna, which historically occurred during lower volatility periods.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
